title: basaltogeton peruvianum
side_effects: Basaltogeton peruvianum can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory problems in some individuals. Ingesting the plant's sap can lead to gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Overuse of the plant's extracts may also result in interactions with medications, potentially exacerbating conditions like high blood pressure and diabetes. Furthermore, improper handling of the plant can cause eye irritation and skin burns.
